headline: Chubb Limited Shareholders Approve 33rd Consecutive Annual Dividend Increase; Chubb Limited Board Declares Record Date for First Dividend Installment and Authorizes New Share Repurchase Program
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) announced today that at its 2026 Annual General Meeting, held at the company's offices in Zurich, Switzerland, shareholders approved a 5.2% increase in the company's dividend to $4.08 per share annually ($1.02 per share, per quarter) from $3.88 per share ($0.97 per share, per quarter). This marks the 33rd consecutive annual increase in the company's dividend. Shareholders also voted in line with the Board's recommendations on all other agenda items at the Annual General
